subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the lights of guidance from the All-Merciful Lord, upon Him be the glory of God, the Mighty, the Bestower, the Horizon of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستنیر بانوار هدایت حضرت رحمان علیه بهاء الله العزیز المنان افق توحید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @call to action, @Manifestation of God as sun, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
